title: Kato Ladder: Seventy Thousand Years of Human Coordination and a Civilizational Ontology of Six Realized Phase Transitions  EPaper 3 submission snapshot
description: Reproducibility archive for Paper 3 (NHB submission). Includes main manuscript (V65), Supplementary Information (V76), reference bibliography (V13), cover letter (V17), significance statement (V1), title page (V4), graphical abstract (V1, vector + raster), and figures Fig. 1 E. Data directory contains the 28-anchor compressed-timeline backbone and the Eq.(2) rank-2 sensitivity envelope output; code directory contains the build scripts for the graphical abstract and for the Fig. 3 / Fig. 4 panels. Seven-axis falsifier battery raw outputs are included for replication of the [2028.4, 2034.4] CE forecast window.

creators.name: Kato, Shota
creators.affiliation: AI and Future Co., Ltd., Tokyo, Japan

notes: NHB initial submission snapshot. Data deposit + code deposit bundled in a single repository (1-deposit mode). If 2-deposit separation is requested, split data/ and code/ into separate repos before GitHub push; both modes are supported by the directory layout. ORCID placeholder will be finalized before Release publish.
